title: CGC Stock Earnings: Q4 2024 Results - Revenue Beat, EPS Miss
text: Canopy Growth reported Q4 2024 earnings results on May 30, 2024. Earnings Per Share (EPS): The company reported -79 cents in EPS, which fell short of analyst expectations of -33 cents, representing a significant miss. Revenue Performance: Canopy Growth generated $54.00 million in revenue, slightly exceeding the analyst estimate of $53.06 million by approximately 1.78%. While Canopy Growth beat revenue projections, it disappointed investors on the bottom line. The larger-than-expected loss per share suggests ongoing profitability challenges despite maintaining revenue growth relative to expectations. The earnings miss on EPS was approximately $0.46 per share worse than expected.
